finding: Button/input height still 36px (h-9) -- below WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 minimum of 44px, no @media (pointer: coarse) override
recommendation: Add min-height: 44px for all interactive elements via @media (pointer: coarse) query

finding: green-600 text (#16a34a) on white background fails WCAG AA at 3.30:1 -- used for positive price changes, buy toggle, and status badges
recommendation: Switch to green-700 (#15803d) which passes at 4.79:1, or use green text on green-50 background only

finding: Tooltip trigger icons are gray-400 (#9ca3af) at 14px (w-3.5) -- 2.54:1 contrast fails WCAG AA and size is below WCAG 2.5.8 touch target
recommendation: Increase icon size to at least 20px (w-5), darken to gray-600 (#4b5563) for 7.23:1 contrast

finding: Currency selector still shows all 5 currencies upfront -- switching from SGD to JPY multiplies amounts ~111x with only a small info box warning
recommendation: Default to SGD, collapse currency behind 'Change currency' link, add confirmation dialog when switching currencies mid-form

finding: No guided first-trade walkthrough -- tooltips added but no dismissible onboarding banner or step-by-step tour for first-time users
recommendation: Add a dismissible 3-step first-visit banner: 1) Choose metal, 2) Set amount, 3) Review and confirm

finding: No footer whatsoever -- no Help, Terms, Privacy, Contact, or regulatory disclosure links
recommendation: Add standard footer with: Help Centre, Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Contact Us, MAS regulatory notice

finding: No receipt download option on order confirmation -- order ID is now human-readable but no way to save proof of transaction
recommendation: Add 'Download Receipt' button generating PDF with order details, timestamp, and reference number

finding: Sell quantity validation error appears as auto-dismissing toast -- 'Cannot sell more than holdings' disappears after a few seconds
recommendation: Show persistent inline error below the amount field instead of an auto-dismissing toast for form validation errors

finding: Limit price field has no guidance -- novice user has no reference for what constitutes a reasonable limit price relative to current market
recommendation: Show current bid/ask next to limit price input, add helper text: 'Current ask: $X. Set below to wait for a dip.'

finding: Live price refreshes every 5 seconds with no visual indicator of update -- prices change silently, user may not notice stale vs fresh data
recommendation: Add subtle pulse/flash animation on price change, show 'Updated Xs ago' countdown near the timestamp

finding: Account dropdown still shows full account numbers (501-100234-001) adding visual noise
recommendation: Simplify to 'Current Account -- S$50,000.00'. Show account numbers only in account settings.

finding: Chart time interval buttons display abbreviations (1H, 1D, 1W) as primary labels -- tooltips help but novices may not hover
recommendation: Show full labels on desktop ('1 Hour', '1 Day') or at minimum on first visit

finding: No responsive font scaling -- base font-size is fixed at 16px with no breakpoint adjustments for larger/smaller screens
recommendation: Use fluid typography: clamp(14px, 1vw + 0.5rem, 18px) for base, or add media query adjustments at sm/lg breakpoints

finding: Compare All Metals table requires explicit toggle -- users must discover and click 'Compare All Metals' link, defaults to hidden
recommendation: Show comparison table by default on desktop, collapse to toggle on mobile only

finding: Order form shows 'Minimum quantity: X ounce' at bottom of form -- easy to miss, only discovered after validation failure
recommendation: Move minimum quantity notice next to the 'You'll receive' display where quantity context is visible
